# harness_fme_traffic_type_attribute (Resource)

Create, update, and delete a Harness FME (Split) traffic type attribute. Import id format: `org_id/project_id/traffic_type_id/attribute_id`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data_type` (String) Data type: e.g. `string`, `number`, `datetime`, `set` (normalized to lowercase in state; Split may return uppercase). Config casing is ignored for diffs.
- `display_name` (String) Display name.
- `identifier` (String) Attribute identifier (id) in Split.
- `org_id` (String) Harness organization identifier.
- `project_id` (String) Harness project identifier.
- `traffic_type_id` (String) Split traffic type ID.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `is_searchable` (Boolean) Whether the attribute is searchable.
- `suggested_values` (List of String) Suggested values for set types.

### Read-Only

- `attribute_id` (String) The attribute ID returned by Split (same as `id`).
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
